title: Fix SaaS cPanel sign-up verification
description:
SaaS sign-up on pipeshare.net stored pending verification codes in the Wasabi snapshot. Concurrent snapshot writes from other API workers could overwrite the code before verify ran, producing "No pending sign-up for this email" even after a valid email was sent.

Pending PINs now live in Postgres (reliable, short-lived). Verify checks Postgres first, then creates the account in Wasabi for SaaS tenants.

Who is affected: anyone signing up for a new pipeshare.net cPanel workspace.
changeLog: SaaS sign-up verification codes stored in Postgres, not Wasabi snapshot.
Verify PIN against Postgres before creating tenant account in Wasabi.
SaaS owner privileges applied on Wasabi sign-up path (parity with Postgres path).
